title: Slingshots
description: This mod adds a variety of different slingshots and pebbles.
body:
### Slingshots
This mod adds 7 different slingshots. A new ranged weapon perfect for mid-game. It uses pebbles as ammunition.

![Slingshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e0e98b77f50f8f58822622a715f68f26caebf46.png)

### Pebbles
There are 4 different types of pebbles wich all have unique abilities.

**Pebble**
This is just a regular pebble crafted from gravel. Not much else to it.

![Pebble](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c1509e417072e6cc751eaec1b3a9b73c90948e2.png)

**Magma Pebble**
This special pebble crafted from magma blocks sets enemies on fire when hit.

![Magma pebble](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c449cf7e9b148eb3a23bc32c87517bcdafedaba3.png)

**Ice Pebble**
This pebble is crafted from blue ice. It has the ability to slow enemies when hit.

![Ice pebble](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46f9d8221fa3cf2cee8fd4e339c1fb4212d6edf9.png)

**Gunpowder Pebble**
This special pebble is crafted from gunpowder. It explodes on impact. But be careful. It can be unstable!!

![Gunpowder pebble](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbeec0528b54eeccad7a78dd65c3ddfcc36bf223.png)


Thank you to 533w7 for helping me create this mod. Check him out!
